endpoints.name: Retrieves built-in policy set definitions.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all the built-in policy set definitions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a built in policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the built-in policy set definition with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Retrieves all policy set definitions in management group.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all the a policy set definition in the given management group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the policy set definition in the given management group with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation creates or updates a policy set definition in the given management group with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation deletes the policy set definition in the given management group with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPID}} with a real managementgroupid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the policy set definitions for a subscription.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all the policy set definitions in the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the policy set definition in the given subscription with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation creates or updates a policy set definition in the given subscription with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a policy set definition.
endpoints.description: This operation deletes the policy set definition in the given subscription with the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSETDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real policysetdefinitionname.
